entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE MID 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 30S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

data.HIGHS: SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 70
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF RAIN SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 40S
